name: Binding Snare
description:
When a creature enters the snare's square, several strands of strong wires ending in jagged hooks latch onto it before hauling it to the ground. The snare deals ] damage, and the targeted creature must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is knocked and for 1 round ([[/act escape show-dc=all dc=28]]).

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is knocked prone, and is for 1 round (Escape DC 28).
